criteria.label: API Integration
criteria.description: Ability to provide seamless, low-latency API connectivity for software development workflows.

criteria.label: Latency Performance
criteria.description: System responsiveness and data retrieval speeds to ensure developer productivity.

criteria.label: Total Cost
criteria.description: All-in cost including licensing, implementation, and support, evaluated against the 20,000 EUR budget.

criteria.label: Payment Terms
criteria.description: Alignment of payment schedules with internal cash flow requirements.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Strict adherence to German and EU data protection laws, specifically GDPR Art. 28.

criteria.label: Security Standards
criteria.description: Presence of robust security certifications (e.g., ISO 27001) and encryption protocols.

criteria.label: Support SLA
criteria.description: Quality of technical support and incident response times.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Guarantee that data is hosted within Germany or the EU to meet legal requirements.
